attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
    BATCH_ID
  , ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID
  , ITEM_ID
  , ITEM_NAME
  , INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  , ITEM_TYPE
  , ERP_SPECIFIC
  , CUSTOM_SPECIFIC
  , HTS_CODE
  , START_DATE
  , END_DATE
  , COUNTRY_GROUP_ID
  , COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
  , RULE_ID
  , CLASSIFICATION_TYPE
  , TC_INTERFACE_FLAG
  , CREATED_BY
  , CREATED_DATE
  , MODIFIED_BY
  , MODIFIED_DATE
  , END_DATED_FLAG
  , NEXTLINX_RULE_ID
  , HTS_START_DATE
  , ITEM_FLAG
  , CREATE_DATETIME
  , ACTION_CODE
  , 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
  , SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
      ,RULE_MODIFY_FLAG
  ,ERP_SPECIFIC_ID
  ,CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSFCATION SXCIC1
 WHERE HTS_CODE IS NOT NULL
	 AND   NOT EXISTS (
		 SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_HTS_CLSFCTN_ASGNMNT_TYPE NIHCAT
			 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN SM
				ON ( SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME = (CASE WHEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN' THEN SM.DD_ITEM_NUM
			                                WHEN    SM.DD_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN'   THEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM
			                         END
			               )
			        AND SM.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD  =  SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
				AND SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE =  (CASE WHEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN' THEN 'CISCO' ELSE 'GTC' END)	
			    )

			 INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SK_RULE_ID_INT,HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
			             FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_TV) NHCR
				ON (NHCR.SK_RULE_ID_INT = COALESCE(SXCIC1.RULE_ID,-999))

			 INNER JOIN
			 (
			  SELECT HTS.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD,HTS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,HTS.BK_ACTIVE_FLG,HTS.BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT, ECCM.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE AS COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
			  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HRMNZD_TRF_SCHDL_CNTRY_LNK HTS
			  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
			  ON (HTS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE)
			  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CTRYGRP_CTRY_MAPPING ECCM
			  ON (NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=ECCM.COUNTRY_CODE)
			  QUALIFY  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD,COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE ORDER BY BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT DESC) = 1
			 )  HTSC

				 ON (HTSC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE= COALESCE(SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,'UN')
				 AND HTSC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD=SXCIC1.HTS_CODE )

		WHERE SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE = NIHCAT.BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD

 )

 UNION ALL
 SELECT
    BATCH_ID
  , ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID
  , ITEM_ID
  , ITEM_NAME
  , INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  , ITEM_TYPE
  , ERP_SPECIFIC
  , CUSTOM_SPECIFIC
  , HTS_CODE
  , START_DATE
  , END_DATE
  , COUNTRY_GROUP_ID
  , COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
  , RULE_ID
  , CLASSIFICATION_TYPE
  , TC_INTERFACE_FLAG
  , CREATED_BY
  , CREATED_DATE
  , MODIFIED_BY
  , MODIFIED_DATE
  , END_DATED_FLAG
  , NEXTLINX_RULE_ID
  , HTS_START_DATE
  , ITEM_FLAG
  , CREATE_DATETIME
  , ACTION_CODE
  , 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
  , SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
      ,RULE_MODIFY_FLAG
  ,ERP_SPECIFIC_ID
  ,CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSFCATION SXCIC1
 WHERE HTS_CODE IS NULL
	 AND   NOT EXISTS (
		 SELECT 1 
		 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_HTS_CLSFCTN_ASGNMNT_TYPE NIHCAT

			 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN SM
				ON ( SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME = (CASE WHEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN' THEN SM.DD_ITEM_NUM
			                                WHEN    SM.DD_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN'   THEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM
			                         END
			                         )
			        AND SM.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD  =  SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
				AND SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE =  (CASE WHEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN' THEN 'CISCO' ELSE 'GTC' END)
				)
			 INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SK_RULE_ID_INT,HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
			             FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_TV) NHCR
				ON (NHCR.SK_RULE_ID_INT = COALESCE(SXCIC1.RULE_ID,-999))
		 WHERE SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE = NIHCAT.BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD
		)

UNION ALL

 SELECT
    BATCH_ID
  , ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID
  , ITEM_ID
  , ITEM_NAME
  , INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  , ITEM_TYPE
  , ERP_SPECIFIC
  , CUSTOM_SPECIFIC
  , HTS_CODE
  , START_DATE
  , END_DATE
  , COUNTRY_GROUP_ID
  , COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
  , RULE_ID
  , CLASSIFICATION_TYPE
  , TC_INTERFACE_FLAG
  , CREATED_BY
  , CREATED_DATE
  , MODIFIED_BY
  , MODIFIED_DATE
  , END_DATED_FLAG
  , NEXTLINX_RULE_ID
  , HTS_START_DATE
  , ITEM_FLAG
  , CREATE_DATETIME
  , ACTION_CODE
  , 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
  , 'UNK' AS ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
      ,RULE_MODIFY_FLAG
  ,ERP_SPECIFIC_ID
  ,CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSFCATION SXCIC1
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSFCATION WXCIC1
 WHERE WXCIC1.BATCH_ID = SXCIC1.BATCH_ID
 AND WXCIC1.ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID = SXCIC1.ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID)

UNION ALL

SELECT
    BATCH_ID
  , ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID
  , ITEM_ID
  , ITEM_NAME
  , INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  , ITEM_TYPE
  , ERP_SPECIFIC
  , CUSTOM_SPECIFIC
  , HTS_CODE
  , START_DATE
  , END_DATE
  , COUNTRY_GROUP_ID
  , COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
  , RULE_ID
  , CLASSIFICATION_TYPE
  , TC_INTERFACE_FLAG
  , CREATED_BY
  , CREATED_DATE
  , MODIFIED_BY
  , MODIFIED_DATE
  , END_DATED_FLAG
  , NEXTLINX_RULE_ID
  , HTS_START_DATE
  , ITEM_FLAG
  , CREATE_DATETIME
  , ACTION_CODE
  , 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
  , SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
    ,RULE_MODIFY_FLAG
  ,ERP_SPECIFIC_ID
  ,CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLSFCTN_GTC SXCIC1
 WHERE HTS_CODE IS NOT NULL
	 AND   NOT EXISTS (
		 SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_HTS_CLSFCTN_ASGNMNT_TYPE NIHCAT
			 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN SM
				ON ( SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME = SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM
			        AND SM.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD  =  SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
				    AND SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE =  'GTC'
			    )

			 INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SK_RULE_ID_INT,HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
			             FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_TV) NHCR
				ON (NHCR.SK_RULE_ID_INT = COALESCE(SXCIC1.RULE_ID,-999))

			 INNER JOIN
			 (
			  SELECT HTS.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD,HTS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,HTS.BK_ACTIVE_FLG,HTS.BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT, ECCM.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE AS COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
			  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HRMNZD_TRF_SCHDL_CNTRY_LNK HTS
			  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
			  ON (HTS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE)
			  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CTRYGRP_CTRY_MAPPING ECCM
			  ON (NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=ECCM.COUNTRY_CODE)
			  QUALIFY  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD,COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE ORDER BY BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT DESC) = 1
			 )  HTSC

				 ON (HTSC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE= COALESCE(SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,'UN')
				 AND HTSC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD=SXCIC1.HTS_CODE )

		WHERE SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE = NIHCAT.BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD

 )

 UNION ALL
 SELECT
    BATCH_ID
  , ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID
  , ITEM_ID
  , ITEM_NAME
  , INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  , ITEM_TYPE
  , ERP_SPECIFIC
  , CUSTOM_SPECIFIC
  , HTS_CODE
  , START_DATE
  , END_DATE
  , COUNTRY_GROUP_ID
  , COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
  , RULE_ID
  , CLASSIFICATION_TYPE
  , TC_INTERFACE_FLAG
  , CREATED_BY
  , CREATED_DATE
  , MODIFIED_BY
  , MODIFIED_DATE
  , END_DATED_FLAG
  , NEXTLINX_RULE_ID
  , HTS_START_DATE
  , ITEM_FLAG
  , CREATE_DATETIME
  , ACTION_CODE
  , 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
  , SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
  ,RULE_MODIFY_FLAG
  ,ERP_SPECIFIC_ID
  ,CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLSFCTN_GTC SXCIC1
 WHERE HTS_CODE IS NULL
	 AND   NOT EXISTS (
		 SELECT 1 
		 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_HTS_CLSFCTN_ASGNMNT_TYPE NIHCAT
		 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN SM
			ON ( SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME = SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM
		        AND SM.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD  =  SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
				AND SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE =  'GTC'
				)
			 INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SK_RULE_ID_INT,HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
			             FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_TV) NHCR
				ON (NHCR.SK_RULE_ID_INT = COALESCE(SXCIC1.RULE_ID,-999))
		 WHERE SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE = NIHCAT.BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD
		)

/*W_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN SQ*/

SELECT
	ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY ,
	BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD ,
	RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM ,
	DD_ITEM_NUM ,
	BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD ,
	BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT ,
	ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE ,
	HTS_ASSIGNED_DT ,
	ITEM_CLSFCTN_MODIFIED_BY_TYPE ,
	BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD ,
	HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY ,
	BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD ,
	BK_ACTIVE_FLG ,
	RU_MODIFIED_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY ,
	RU_MDFD_CSTMS_ITM_CLFTN_SYS_CD ,
	EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	EDW_CREATE_USER ,
	EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
	EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
	START_TV_DTM ,
	END_TV_DTM ,
	RU_ITEM_KEY ,
	DV_FIRST_OCCURRENCE_FLG ,
	ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
	CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
	SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
	SRC_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	RULE_MODIFY_FLG,
	DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
	ITEM_CLSFCTN_MDFD_DTM,
	DV_ITEM_CLSFCTN_MDFD_DT,
	ACTION_CODE,
	DML_TYPE
FROM
(	SELECT	
		SXCIC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
		COALESCE(HTS_CODE,'UNKNOWN')   BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD,
		SXCIC.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM AS RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
		SXCIC.DD_ITEM_NUM,
		SXCIC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE AS BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,
		SXCIC.BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT AS BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
		SXCIC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
		COALESCE(SXCIC.HTS_START_DATE,TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') HTS_ASSIGNED_DT,
		(CASE	WHEN  (SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY LIKE 'SYSTEM%' OR SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'DM' OR SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'AUTO') THEN 'AUTO'
		        ELSE	'CISCO WORKER' END	) ITEM_CLSFCTN_MODIFIED_BY_TYPE,
		COALESCE(SXCIC.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')  BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD,
		SXCIC.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY,
		SXCIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
		(CASE	WHEN SXCIC.END_DATE IS NULL  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) BK_ACTIVE_FLG,
		( CASE	WHEN  (SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY LIKE 'SYSTEM%' OR SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'DM' OR SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'AUTO') THEN -999
				ELSE COALESCE(NCWP_TV.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) END)  RU_MODIFIED_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
		(CASE	WHEN  (SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY LIKE 'SYSTEM%' OR SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'DM' OR	SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'AUTO') THEN SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY
        		ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) RU_MDFD_CSTMS_ITM_CLFTN_SYS_CD,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
		USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
		USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
		CAST(SXCIC.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS START_TV_DTM,
		COALESCE(CAST(SXCIC.END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)), TIMESTAMP  '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  ) END_TV_DTM,
		COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS RU_ITEM_KEY,
		COALESCE(NTV.DV_FIRST_OCCURRENCE_FLG,'N') AS  DV_FIRST_OCCURRENCE_FLG,
			     COALESCE(NCIS1.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
	     COALESCE(NCIS2.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
	     COALESCE(SXCIC.CREATED_DATE,TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') AS SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
	    COALESCE(NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	    COALESCE(SXCIC.RULE_MODIFY_FLAG,'N') AS RULE_MODIFY_FLG,
	    COALESCE(SXCIC.CREATED_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
		COALESCE(SXCIC.MODIFIED_DATE,TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00')   ITEM_CLSFCTN_MDFD_DTM,
		COALESCE(SXCIC.MODIFIED_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')   DV_ITEM_CLSFCTN_MDFD_DT,
		'I' ACTION_CODE ,
		CASE WHEN NTV.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS  DML_TYPE
	FROM	   (

		SELECT	
			SM.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
			SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME,
			SXCIC1.HTS_CODE,
			SXCIC1.START_DATE,
			SXCIC1.END_DATE,
			SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,
			SXCIC1.RULE_ID,
			SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE,
			SXCIC1.CREATED_BY,
			SXCIC1.MODIFIED_BY,
			SXCIC1.HTS_START_DATE,
			SXCIC1.MODIFIED_DATE,
			SXCIC1.CREATE_DATETIME,
			HTSC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD AS BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
			HTSC.BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT AS BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
			NHCR.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY,
			HTSC.BK_ACTIVE_FLG,
			CREATED_DATE,
			SM.DD_ITEM_NUM,
			SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
			SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
						SXCIC1.RULE_MODIFY_FLAG,
						SXCIC1.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
			SXCIC1.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
		FROM $$STGDB.WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSFCATION SXCIC1
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN SM
			 ON ( SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME = (CASE WHEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN' THEN SM.DD_ITEM_NUM
						  WHEN    SM.DD_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN'   THEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM END)
			   AND SM.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD  =  SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
			   AND SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE =  (CASE WHEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN' THEN 'CISCO' ELSE 'GTC' END)
			   )
			INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SK_RULE_ID_INT,HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
					FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_TV) NHCR
			   ON (NHCR.SK_RULE_ID_INT = COALESCE(SXCIC1.RULE_ID,-999))
			INNER JOIN
				(
				 SELECT HTS.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD,HTS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,HTS.BK_ACTIVE_FLG,HTS.BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT, ECCM.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE AS COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
				 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HRMNZD_TRF_SCHDL_CNTRY_LNK HTS
				 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
				 ON (HTS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE)
				 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CTRYGRP_CTRY_MAPPING ECCM
				 ON (NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=ECCM.COUNTRY_CODE)
				 QUALIFY  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD,COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE ORDER BY BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT DESC) = 1
				)  HTSC

 			 ON (HTSC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE= COALESCE(SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,'UN')
			    AND HTSC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD=SXCIC1.HTS_CODE )
		WHERE HTS_CODE IS NOT NULL
		     AND SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE IN ( SELECT BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_HTS_CLSFCTN_ASGNMNT_TYPE)

		UNION ALL
		SELECT	SM.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
			SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME,
			SXCIC1.HTS_CODE,
			SXCIC1.START_DATE,
			SXCIC1.END_DATE,
			SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,
			SXCIC1.RULE_ID,
			SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE,
			SXCIC1.CREATED_BY,
			SXCIC1.MODIFIED_BY,
			SXCIC1.HTS_START_DATE,
			SXCIC1.MODIFIED_DATE,
			SXCIC1.CREATE_DATETIME,
			'UNK' AS BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
			DATE '1900-01-01' AS BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
			NHCR.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY,
			'N' AS BK_ACTIVE_FLAG, 
			CREATED_DATE,
			SM.DD_ITEM_NUM,
			SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
			SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
						SXCIC1.RULE_MODIFY_FLAG,
						SXCIC1.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
			SXCIC1.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
		FROM	$$STGDB.WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSFCATION  SXCIC1
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN SM
			  ON ( SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME = (CASE WHEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN' THEN SM.DD_ITEM_NUM
						  WHEN    SM.DD_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN'   THEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM END)
			  AND SM.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD  =  SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
			  AND SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE =  (CASE WHEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN' THEN 'CISCO' ELSE 'GTC' END)
			     )
			INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SK_RULE_ID_INT,HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_TV) NHCR
			  ON (NHCR.SK_RULE_ID_INT = COALESCE(SXCIC1.RULE_ID,-999))
		WHERE HTS_CODE IS NULL
		      AND SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE IN ( SELECT BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_HTS_CLSFCTN_ASGNMNT_TYPE)
	) SXCIC
	LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_TV
	  ON (NCWP_TV.CEC_ID = SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY)

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	  ON (SXCIC.ITEM_NAME = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
	  
	  					LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS1 
			ON SXCIC.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS1.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
            LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2 
            ON SXCIC.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
            LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP ON 
			SXCIC.CREATED_BY=NCWP.CEC_ID

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN_TV NTV
	  ON (SXCIC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY = NTV.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY
	   AND CAST(SXCIC.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) = NTV.START_TV_DTM
	   AND END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00')
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SXCIC.ITEM_NAME,SXCIC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,SXCIC.START_DATE
			ORDER BY COALESCE(SXCIC.END_DATE,TIMESTAMP'3500-01-01 00:00:00') DESC) = 1
)A

SELECT
	 RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SXCIC.ITEM_NAME,SXCIC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE) + SMKEY.MAX_VAL AS ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
	 COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE AS BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,
	 (CASE WHEN SXCIC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE = 'CISCO' THEN SXCIC.ITEM_NAME ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS DD_ITEM_NUM,
	 (CASE WHEN SXCIC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE = 'GTC' THEN SXCIC.ITEM_NAME ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
	 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ,
	 USER
FROM
	(
	 SELECT  ITEM_NAME,COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
	 FROM $$STGDB.WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSFCATION
	 GROUP BY 1,2,3
	) SXCIC
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG
	 ON ( SXCIC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE = NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD)
   ,(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY),0) AS MAX_VAL FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN) SMKEY
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
  ( SELECT 1
       FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN SM
       WHERE SXCIC.ITEM_NAME = (CASE WHEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN'  THEN SM.DD_ITEM_NUM
				     WHEN SM.DD_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN' THEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM
                                END)
        AND SM.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD  =  SXCIC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
	AND SXCIC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE =  (CASE WHEN SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = 'UNKNOWN' THEN 'CISCO' ELSE 'GTC' END)
 )

SELECT 
	  BATCH_ID
	, ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID
	, ITEM_ID
	, ITEM_NAME
	, INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
	, ITEM_TYPE
	, ERP_SPECIFIC
	, CUSTOM_SPECIFIC
	, HTS_CODE
	, START_DATE
	, END_DATE
	, COUNTRY_GROUP_ID
	, COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
	, RULE_ID
	, CLASSIFICATION_TYPE
	, TC_INTERFACE_FLAG
	, CREATED_BY
	, CREATED_DATE
	, MODIFIED_BY
	, MODIFIED_DATE
	, END_DATED_FLAG
	, NEXTLINX_RULE_ID
	, HTS_START_DATE
	, ITEM_FLAG
	, CREATE_DATETIME
	, ACTION_CODE
	, 'IC1_START_GT_END' EXCEPTION_TYPE  ,
	   RULE_MODIFY_FLAG,
	     ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
	       CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID       
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSFCATION SXCIC 
WHERE START_DATE > END_DATE

/*  W_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN  thru WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLSFCTN_GTC*/

SELECT
	ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY ,
	BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD ,
	RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM ,
	DD_ITEM_NUM ,
	BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD ,
	BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT ,
	ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE ,
	HTS_ASSIGNED_DT ,
	ITEM_CLSFCTN_MODIFIED_BY_TYPE ,
	BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD ,
	HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY ,
	BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD ,
	BK_ACTIVE_FLG ,
	RU_MODIFIED_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY ,
	RU_MDFD_CSTMS_ITM_CLFTN_SYS_CD ,
	EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	EDW_CREATE_USER ,
	EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
	EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
	START_TV_DTM ,
	END_TV_DTM ,
	RU_ITEM_KEY ,
	DV_FIRST_OCCURRENCE_FLG ,
    ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
	CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
	SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
	SRC_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	RULE_MODIFY_FLG,
	DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
	ITEM_CLSFCTN_MDFD_DTM,
	DV_ITEM_CLSFCTN_MDFD_DT,
	ACTION_CODE,
	DML_TYPE
FROM
(

	SELECT	
		SXCIC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
		COALESCE(HTS_CODE,'UNKNOWN')   BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD,
		SXCIC.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM AS RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
		SXCIC.DD_ITEM_NUM,
		SXCIC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE AS BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD,
		SXCIC.BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT AS BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
		SXCIC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
		COALESCE(SXCIC.HTS_START_DATE,TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') HTS_ASSIGNED_DT,
		(CASE	WHEN  (SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY LIKE 'SYSTEM%' OR SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'DM' OR SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'AUTO') THEN 'AUTO'
		        ELSE 'CISCO WORKER' END) ITEM_CLSFCTN_MODIFIED_BY_TYPE,
		COALESCE(SXCIC.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')  BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD,
		SXCIC.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY,
		SXCIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
		(CASE	WHEN SXCIC.END_DATE IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END	)  BK_ACTIVE_FLG,
		( CASE	WHEN  (SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY LIKE 'SYSTEM%'  OR SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'DM'  OR SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'AUTO') THEN -999
				ELSE	COALESCE(NCWP_TV.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) END )  RU_MODIFIED_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
		(CASE	WHEN  (SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY LIKE 'SYSTEM%' OR SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'DM' OR SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY = 'AUTO') THEN SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY
        		ELSE	'UNKNOWN' END	) RU_MDFD_CSTMS_ITM_CLFTN_SYS_CD,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
		USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER ,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
		USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
		CAST(SXCIC.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS START_TV_DTM,
		COALESCE(CAST(SXCIC.END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)), TIMESTAMP  '3500-01-01 00:00:00') AS END_TV_DTM,
		COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS RU_ITEM_KEY,
		COALESCE(NTV.DV_FIRST_OCCURRENCE_FLG,'N') AS  DV_FIRST_OCCURRENCE_FLG,
	    COALESCE(NCIS1.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
	     COALESCE(NCIS2.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,
	     COALESCE(SXCIC.CREATED_DATE,TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') AS SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
	    COALESCE(NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	    COALESCE(SXCIC.RULE_MODIFY_FLAG,'N') AS RULE_MODIFY_FLG,
	    COALESCE(SXCIC.CREATED_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
		COALESCE(SXCIC.MODIFIED_DATE,TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00')   ITEM_CLSFCTN_MDFD_DTM,
		COALESCE(SXCIC.MODIFIED_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')   DV_ITEM_CLSFCTN_MDFD_DT,
		'I' ACTION_CODE ,
		CASE WHEN NTV.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS  DML_TYPE
	FROM
		(
		SELECT	
			SM.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
			SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME,
			SXCIC1.HTS_CODE,
			SXCIC1.START_DATE,
			SXCIC1.END_DATE,
			SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,
			SXCIC1.RULE_ID,
			SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE,
                    SXCIC1.CREATED_BY,
			SXCIC1.MODIFIED_BY,
			SXCIC1.HTS_START_DATE,
			SXCIC1.MODIFIED_DATE,
			SXCIC1.CREATE_DATETIME,
			HTSC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD AS BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
			HTSC.BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT AS BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
			NHCR.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY,
			HTSC.BK_ACTIVE_FLG,CREATED_DATE,
			SM.DD_ITEM_NUM,
			SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
			SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
			SXCIC1.RULE_MODIFY_FLAG,
			SXCIC1.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
			SXCIC1.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
		FROM $$STGDB.WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLSFCTN_GTC SXCIC1
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN SM
				ON ( SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME = SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM
				       AND SM.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD  =  SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE )
			INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SK_RULE_ID_INT,HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
				     FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_TV) NHCR
				ON (NHCR.SK_RULE_ID_INT = COALESCE(SXCIC1.RULE_ID,-999))
			INNER JOIN
			      (
				SELECT HTS.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD,
					HTS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,HTS.BK_ACTIVE_FLG,
					HTS.BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
					ECCM.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE AS COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HRMNZD_TRF_SCHDL_CNTRY_LNK HTS
					INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC		
				 ON (HTS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE)
				 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CTRYGRP_CTRY_MAPPING ECCM
				 ON (NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=ECCM.COUNTRY_CODE)
				 QUALIFY  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD,COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE ORDER BY BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT DESC) = 1
				)  HTSC
				ON (HTSC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE= COALESCE(SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,'UN')
				AND HTSC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD=SXCIC1.HTS_CODE )
			WHERE HTS_CODE IS NOT NULL
				AND SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE IN ( SELECT BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_HTS_CLSFCTN_ASGNMNT_TYPE)
		UNION ALL
		SELECT	
			SM.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
			SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME,
			SXCIC1.HTS_CODE,
			SXCIC1.START_DATE,
			SXCIC1.END_DATE,
			SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,
			SXCIC1.RULE_ID,
			SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE,
                   SXCIC1.CREATED_BY,
			SXCIC1.MODIFIED_BY,
			SXCIC1.HTS_START_DATE,
			SXCIC1.MODIFIED_DATE,
			SXCIC1.CREATE_DATETIME,
			'UNK' AS BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
			DATE '1900-01-01' AS BK_HTS_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
			NHCR.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY,
			'N' AS BK_ACTIVE_FLAG,
			SXCIC1.CREATED_DATE,
			SM.DD_ITEM_NUM,
			SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
			SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
			SXCIC1.RULE_MODIFY_FLAG,
			SXCIC1.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
			SXCIC1.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
		FROM	$$STGDB.WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLSFCTN_GTC  SXCIC1
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN SM
 			 ON ( SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME =  SM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM
			     AND SM.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD  =  SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
			   )
			INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SK_RULE_ID_INT,HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
			            FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_TV) NHCR
			ON (NHCR.SK_RULE_ID_INT = COALESCE(SXCIC1.RULE_ID,-999))
		WHERE HTS_CODE IS NULL
			AND SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE IN ( SELECT BK_ITM_HTS_CLSFTN_ASGMT_TYP_CD FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_HTS_CLSFCTN_ASGNMNT_TYPE)
		) SXCIC
		LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS1 
			ON SXCIC.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS1.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
            LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2 
            ON SXCIC.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
            LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP ON 
			SXCIC.CREATED_BY=NCWP.CEC_ID
	LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_TV
		ON (NCWP_TV.CEC_ID = SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY)

	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
		ON (SXCIC.ITEM_NAME = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN_TV NTV
		ON (SXCIC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY = NTV.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY
		 AND CAST(SXCIC.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) = NTV.START_TV_DTM
		 AND END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00')
	QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SXCIC.ITEM_NAME,SXCIC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,SXCIC.START_DATE ORDER BY COALESCE(SXCIC.END_DATE,TIMESTAMP'3500-01-01 00:00:00') DESC) = 1

)A

/* SQ QUERY */
/* PULL  the GTC Classfication records  - ie, items that are fully migrated to enterprise , 
but classification record in N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN is still a GTC classification - 
GTC Classification differentiated by  comparing the ITEM_NAMEs with RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM of this TV table*/
SELECT
	SXCIC1.BATCH_ID ,
	SXCIC1.ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID ,
	SXCIC1.ITEM_ID ,
	SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME ,
	SXCIC1.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,
	SXCIC1.ITEM_TYPE ,
	SXCIC1.ERP_SPECIFIC ,
	SXCIC1.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC ,
	SXCIC1.HTS_CODE ,
	SXCIC1.START_DATE ,
	SXCIC1.END_DATE ,
	SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_ID ,
	SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE ,
	SXCIC1.RULE_ID ,
	SXCIC1.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE ,
	SXCIC1.TC_INTERFACE_FLAG ,
	SXCIC1.CREATED_BY ,
	SXCIC1.CREATED_DATE ,
	SXCIC1.MODIFIED_BY ,
	SXCIC1.MODIFIED_DATE ,
	SXCIC1.END_DATED_FLAG ,
	SXCIC1.NEXTLINX_RULE_ID ,
	SXCIC1.HTS_START_DATE ,
	SXCIC1.ITEM_FLAG ,
	SXCIC1.CREATE_DATETIME ,
	SXCIC1.ACTION_CODE ,
	SXCIC1.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	SXCIC1.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
	SXCIC1.RULE_MODIFY_FLAG,
	SXCIC1.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
	SXCIC1.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
FROM $$STGDB.WI_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSFCATION SXCIC1
WHERE EXISTS
	(
	SELECT 1
	FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_ITEM NGI12
	     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
		 ON (NP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID = SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME)  
	     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CUSTOMS NIC1
	         ON (NIC1.ITEM_KEY = NP1.ITEM_KEY )   
	     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN_TV NTV12
	       ON (SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME = NTV12.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM /* JOIN on RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM to get the GTC classification */
		AND NTV12.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD  =  SXCIC1.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE
		AND CAST(SXCIC1.START_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) = NTV12.START_TV_DTM
		AND NTV12.END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00')	  
	  WHERE SXCIC1.ITEM_NAME = NGI12.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM
	)

/*SQ */

SELECT
	SXCIC.BATCH_ID ,
	SXCIC.ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID ,
	SXCIC.ITEM_ID ,
	SXCIC.ITEM_NAME ,
	SXCIC.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,
	SXCIC.ITEM_TYPE ,
	SXCIC.ERP_SPECIFIC ,
	SXCIC.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC ,
	SXCIC.HTS_CODE ,
	SXCIC.START_DATE ,
	SXCIC.END_DATE ,
	SXCIC.COUNTRY_GROUP_ID ,
	SXCIC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE ,
	SXCIC.RULE_ID ,
	SXCIC.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE ,
	SXCIC.TC_INTERFACE_FLAG ,
	SXCIC.CREATED_BY ,
	SXCIC.CREATED_DATE ,
	SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY ,
	SXCIC.MODIFIED_DATE ,
	SXCIC.END_DATED_FLAG ,
	SXCIC.NEXTLINX_RULE_ID ,
	SXCIC.HTS_START_DATE ,
	SXCIC.ITEM_FLAG ,
	SXCIC.CREATE_DATETIME ,
	SXCIC.ACTION_CODE ,
	'ST' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	ITEM.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
    SXCIC.RULE_MODIFY_FLAG,
	SXCIC.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
	SXCIC.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSFCATION SXCIC
	INNER JOIN
	(
	 SELECT ITEM_NAME,
		ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
	 FROM
	  ( SELECT NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS ITEM_NAME,
		'CISCO'  AS ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
		1 AS PRIORITY
	    FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CUSTOMS NIC
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
		 ON (NIC.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY)
	    UNION 
	    SELECT BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM  AS ITEM_NAME,
		'GTC' AS ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
		2 AS PRIORITY
	     FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_ITEM
	   )ITEM1
	   QUALIFY RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ITEM_NAME ORDER BY PRIORITY)=1
	)ITEM
	ON (ITEM.ITEM_NAME = SXCIC.ITEM_NAME)
UNION	
SELECT
	SXCIC.BATCH_ID ,
	SXCIC.ITEM_CLASSIFICATION_ID ,
	SXCIC.ITEM_ID ,
	SXCIC.ITEM_NAME ,
	SXCIC.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,
	SXCIC.ITEM_TYPE ,
	SXCIC.ERP_SPECIFIC ,
	SXCIC.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC ,
	SXCIC.HTS_CODE ,
	SXCIC.START_DATE ,
	SXCIC.END_DATE ,
	SXCIC.COUNTRY_GROUP_ID ,
	SXCIC.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE ,
	SXCIC.RULE_ID ,
	SXCIC.CLASSIFICATION_TYPE ,
	SXCIC.TC_INTERFACE_FLAG ,
	SXCIC.CREATED_BY ,
	SXCIC.CREATED_DATE ,
	SXCIC.MODIFIED_BY ,
	SXCIC.MODIFIED_DATE ,
	SXCIC.END_DATED_FLAG ,
	SXCIC.NEXTLINX_RULE_ID ,
	SXCIC.HTS_START_DATE ,
	SXCIC.ITEM_FLAG ,
	SXCIC.CREATE_DATETIME ,
	SXCIC.ACTION_CODE ,
	SXCIC.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	ITEM.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
	SXCIC.RULE_MODIFY_FLAG,
	SXCIC.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
	SXCIC.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFI_CB_ITEM_CLASSFCATION SXCIC
	INNER JOIN
	(
	 SELECT ITEM_NAME,
		ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
	 FROM
	  ( SELECT NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS ITEM_NAME,
		'CISCO'  AS ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
		1 AS PRIORITY
	    FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CUSTOMS NIC
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
		 ON (NIC.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY)
	    UNION
	    SELECT BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM  AS ITEM_NAME,
		'GTC' AS ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE,
		2 AS PRIORITY
	     FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_ITEM
	   )ITEM1
	   QUALIFY RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ITEM_NAME ORDER BY PRIORITY)=1
	)ITEM
	ON (ITEM.ITEM_NAME = SXCIC.ITEM_NAME)
